summary: Synthetic spec used to drive a live activation of the test-grounded executability validator (C2). Three user stories each name a distinct test path; one points at a healthy stub, one at a broken-import stub, one at a stub whose function name does not match the spec.

user_stories.title: Baseline collectable test
user_stories.description: Story whose independent test is a healthy pytest stub that should collect cleanly.
user_stories.why_this_priority: Anchors the negative case for the validator: a passing reference must not produce a problem.

acceptance.then: the node id tests/test_gap_c2_ok.py::test_baseline is collected

user_stories.title: Broken-import test
user_stories.description: Story whose independent test imports a module that does not exist.
user_stories.why_this_priority: Forces C2 to surface an import_error so the rewriter can fix the spec or the test.

acceptance.given: the stub file tests/test_gap_c2_brokenimport.py imports a nonexistent module
acceptance.then: C2 surfaces a TestExecutabilityProblem with kind=import_error

user_stories.title: Wrong-function-name test
user_stories.description: Story whose independent test names a function that is not defined in the stub file.
user_stories.why_this_priority: Forces C2 to detect a function-level miss against an otherwise collectable file.

acceptance.given: the stub file tests/test_gap_c2_nofunc.py defines test_present but not test_missing
acceptance.then: C2 surfaces a TestExecutabilityProblem for tests/test_gap_c2_nofunc.py::test_missing
